ddls:
CREATE TABLE "upgrade_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_no" INTEGER /* Sequential number for the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "sap_note" TEXT /* Reference to related SAP notes */,
  "execution_steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps to execute the task */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the task */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated time required to complete the task */,
  "criticality_level" TEXT /* Level of criticality for the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "dependency_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that this task depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_info" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that was executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the task */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task execution (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message in case of a failure */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES upgrade_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temporary_objects" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the temporary object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the temporary object (e.g., table, view) */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the temporary object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the temporary object was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upgrade_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit check */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being audited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or findings */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the task (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that depends on the primary task */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., sequential, parallel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES upgrade_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES upgrade_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the status check */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the current system status */,
  "system_component" TEXT /* Component of the system being checked (e.g., database, application server) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executed_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executed step */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that the step belongs to */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to execute the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executed_steps_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES upgrade_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task where the error occurred */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was logged */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message detailing the issue */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., technical, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES upgrade_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
